nasb.text: For her blood is in her midst; She placed it on the bare rock; She did not pour it on the ground To cover it with dust.

esv.text: For the blood she has shed is in her midst; she put it on the bare rock; she did not pour it out on the ground to cover it with dust.

cnv.text: 因為她所流的血還在城中； 她把血潑在光滑的磐石上， 不是倒在地上， 被塵土掩蓋。

ccb.text: 这城沾满血腥，任凭受害者的血流在光秃秃的磐石上，而不是流在地上用土掩盖。
